---
title: 'Learning source, path and site effects: CNN-based on-site intensity prediction for earthquake early warning'
date: '2022-01-01'
author: [Hongcai Zhang, Diego Melgar, Valerie Sahakian, Jake Searcy, Jiun-Ting Lin]
publication: Geophysical Journal International, **3**, _2186-2204_ (2022).
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://academic.oup.com/gji/article/231/3/2186/6671555'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Geophysical Journal International
issue: 3
page: "2186-2204"
year: 2022
image: ''
pub_number: 5
---
